name: urban_planning_classroom_monitoring_stonehaven_tru_loy
premise: A Urban Planning response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving urban planning classroom monitoring stonehaven tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is within 20 minutes. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Nadia Morales
agents.identity: I am Nadia Morales, accountable for a defensible call in Urban Planning when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Amina Berg
agents.identity: I am Amina Berg, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Urban Planning.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is within 20 minutes. Evidence is partial. Nadia Morales must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Nadia Morales do?
